description: Independent quantitative review standard for medical ML prediction models. Covers 10 dimensions with 73 criteria across 3 review levels. Each criterion maps to specific gates, literature references, and pass conditions.

quick.description: Critical red-line checks — catches fatal flaws that invalidate all results

standard.description: Standard review coverage for conference/journal submissions

comprehensive.description: Top-journal-grade full review — Nature Medicine / JAMA / BMJ / Lancet level

criteria.text: Train/validation/test datasets are physically separate files (no path reuse)
criteria.text_zh: 训练/验证/测试数据集为物理分离的文件（无路径复用）
criteria.pass_condition: Three distinct CSV/Parquet files exist with no shared file paths

criteria.text: Patient-level disjointness — no patient appears in multiple splits
criteria.text_zh: 患者级别不重叠（同一患者不出现在多个分割中）
criteria.pass_condition: Entity overlap count = 0 across all split pairs

criteria.text: Row-level overlap audit passes (no duplicate rows across splits)
criteria.text_zh: 行级别重叠审计通过（分割间无重复行）
criteria.pass_condition: row_overlap_audit.overlap_count = 0

criteria.text: Temporal ordering preserved (test data is chronologically after training)
criteria.text_zh: 时间顺序保持（测试数据在时间上晚于训练数据）
criteria.pass_condition: Out-of-time split with max(train_date) < min(test_date)

criteria.text: Exclusion criteria documented with patient flow diagram
criteria.text_zh: 排除标准已记录，附患者流程图
criteria.pass_condition: Exclusion criteria section present in study protocol or report

criteria.text: Event rate and sample counts documented per split
criteria.text_zh: 每个分割的事件率和样本数已记录
criteria.pass_condition: train/valid/test sample_count and event_rate present in evidence

criteria.text: Covariate shift audit between train and holdout splits
criteria.text_zh: 训练集与保留集之间的协变量漂移审计
criteria.pass_condition: covariate_shift_report.json with no critical drift flags

criteria.text: No target leakage — target variable not used as feature
criteria.text_zh: 无目标泄漏——目标变量未用作特征
criteria.pass_condition: Leakage gate passes with no target_in_features flag

criteria.text: No definition variable leak — disease-defining variables excluded from predictors
criteria.text_zh: 无定义变量泄漏——疾病定义变量已从预测因子中排除
criteria.pass_condition: definition_variable_guard passes

criteria.text: No feature lineage leakage — derived features do not descend from forbidden ancestors
criteria.text_zh: 无特征谱系泄漏——派生特征不来自禁止的祖先变量
criteria.pass_condition: feature_lineage_gate passes with no forbidden ancestors

criteria.text: All features available at or before t_index (no post-outcome features)
criteria.text_zh: 所有特征在 t_index 时或之前可用（无结局后特征）
criteria.pass_condition: No features with availability_time > t_index

criteria.text: ICD/diagnosis code timestamp audit against t_index
criteria.text_zh: ICD/诊断代码时间戳与 t_index 的审计
criteria.pass_condition: All diagnosis codes timestamped before t_index

criteria.text: As-of joins used for all external/relational table lookups
criteria.text_zh: 所有外部/关系表查找使用 as-of 连接
criteria.pass_condition: Code review confirms temporal-aware joins

criteria.text: Feature definitions versioned with generation code
criteria.text_zh: 特征定义已版本化，附生成代码
criteria.pass_condition: Feature generation code tracked in version control

criteria.text: No label leakage via ICD code co-occurrence patterns
criteria.text_zh: 无通过 ICD 编码共现模式的标签泄漏
criteria.pass_condition: ICD code temporal analysis shows no post-outcome encoding

criteria.text: Preprocessors (scalers, encoders) fitted on training folds only
criteria.text_zh: 预处理器（标准化器、编码器）仅在训练折上拟合
criteria.pass_condition: No fit() calls on validation/test data
criteria.evidence_required: Code audit or pipeline isolation evidence

criteria.text: Imputers fitted on training folds only, transform applied forward
criteria.text_zh: 插补器仅在训练折上拟合，变换向前应用
criteria.pass_condition: Imputation fit only on train, transform on valid/test

criteria.text: SMOTE/resampling applied only on training folds (never valid/test)
criteria.text_zh: SMOTE/重采样仅在训练折上应用（不在验证/测试上）
criteria.pass_condition: Resampling code only within training loop/fold

criteria.text: Feature selection performed inside CV loops only
criteria.text_zh: 特征选择仅在交叉验证循环内执行
criteria.pass_condition: Feature selection not applied globally before CV

criteria.text: No target/outcome values used in feature imputation
criteria.text_zh: 特征插补中未使用目标/结局值
criteria.pass_condition: Imputation pipeline does not access y_train

criteria.text: Preprocessing + model kept in one fold-aware pipeline object
criteria.text_zh: 预处理和模型保持在一个感知折的管道对象中
criteria.pass_condition: sklearn Pipeline or equivalent encapsulates full flow

criteria.text: MICE imputation uses scale guard and audited fallback for oversized data
criteria.text_zh: MICE 插补使用缩放保护和大数据审计回退
criteria.pass_condition: mice_with_scale_guard enforced when MICE is used

criteria.text: Candidate model pool ≥ 3 families including interpretable baseline (logistic regression)
criteria.text_zh: 候选模型池 ≥ 3 个家族，包含可解释基线（逻辑回归）
criteria.pass_condition: model_selection_report shows ≥3 families with logistic baseline

criteria.text: No test set peeking during architecture selection or hyperparameter tuning
criteria.text_zh: 架构选择和超参数调优期间未窥视测试集
criteria.pass_condition: All test_used_* flags are false in tuning protocol

criteria.text: Hyperparameters tuned using inner CV or validation set only
criteria.text_zh: 超参数仅使用内层交叉验证或验证集调优
criteria.pass_condition: Tuning protocol specifies inner_cv or validation scope

criteria.text: One-SE rule or simplicity preference documented in model selection
criteria.text_zh: 模型选择中记录了 one-SE 规则或简约偏好
criteria.pass_condition: Selection report documents simplicity/one-SE consideration

criteria.text: Threshold/calibration selected without final test outcomes
criteria.text_zh: 阈值/校准在不使用最终测试结局的情况下选择
criteria.pass_condition: Threshold selection split is validation or inner-CV, not test

criteria.text: Model pool policy explicitly declared (families, max trials, search strategy)
criteria.text_zh: 模型池策略明确声明（家族、最大试验数、搜索策略）
criteria.pass_condition: Model selection report includes pool policy section

criteria.text: Regularization evidence documented per model family (L1/L2/tree complexity)
criteria.text_zh: 每个模型家族的正则化证据已记录（L1/L2/树复杂度）
criteria.pass_condition: Regularization parameters documented in selection artifacts

criteria.text: Bootstrap or repeated-resampling confidence intervals for all primary metrics
criteria.text_zh: 所有主要指标的 Bootstrap 或重复重采样置信区间
criteria.pass_condition: CI reported for ROC-AUC, PR-AUC, and primary metric

criteria.text: Label permutation test with chance-level expectation
criteria.text_zh: 标签排列检验，预期为随机水平
criteria.pass_condition: Permutation p-value < 0.05 and permuted metrics near chance

criteria.text: Calibration metrics reported (ECE, calibration slope, calibration intercept)
criteria.text_zh: 校准指标已报告（ECE、校准斜率、校准截距）
criteria.pass_condition: ECE < 0.10 and calibration slope within [0.8, 1.2]

criteria.text: Decision curve analysis demonstrating net benefit over treat-all/treat-none
criteria.text_zh: 决策曲线分析证明净收益优于全治疗/不治疗策略
criteria.pass_condition: Net benefit > treat-all in clinically relevant threshold range

criteria.text: No non-finite metric values (NaN, Inf) in any evidence file
criteria.text_zh: 任何证据文件中无非有限指标值（NaN, Inf）
criteria.pass_condition: All numeric values in evidence files are finite

criteria.text: Prediction trace replay matches evaluation report metrics within tolerance
criteria.text_zh: 预测轨迹重放与评估报告指标在容差范围内一致
criteria.pass_condition: Replayed PR-AUC/ROC-AUC/Brier match within policy tolerance

criteria.text: Metric consistency validated — precision==PPV, formulas match confusion matrix
criteria.text_zh: 指标一致性已验证——precision==PPV，公式与混淆矩阵一致
criteria.pass_condition: All metric cross-checks pass within numerical tolerance

criteria.text: DeLong test for AUC comparison between candidate and baseline models
criteria.text_zh: DeLong 检验用于候选模型与基线模型的 AUC 比较
criteria.pass_condition: DeLong p-value reported for primary model vs baseline

criteria.text: Train-test generalization gap within policy thresholds (fail-closed)
criteria.text_zh: 训练-测试泛化差距在策略阈值内（失败即关闭）
criteria.pass_condition: gap_thresholds for train-valid, valid-test, train-test all pass

criteria.text: At least one external validation cohort (cross-period or cross-institution)
criteria.text_zh: 至少一个外部验证队列（跨时间段或跨机构）
criteria.pass_condition: external_validation_report.json present with transport_gap metrics

criteria.text: Multi-seed stability analysis across ≥5 random seeds
criteria.text_zh: 多种子稳定性分析，跨 ≥5 个随机种子
criteria.pass_condition: seed_stability_report.json passes gate thresholds

criteria.text: Subgroup robustness analysis across demographic/clinical variables
criteria.text_zh: 跨人口统计/临床变量的亚组稳健性分析
criteria.pass_condition: robustness_report.json subgroup analysis present

criteria.text: Transport gap acceptable on external cohort (primary metric drop < 15%)
criteria.text_zh: 外部队列上的传输差距可接受（主要指标下降 < 15%）
criteria.pass_condition: Transport gap < 0.15 absolute for primary metric

criteria.text: Time-slice robustness analysis across different temporal windows
criteria.text_zh: 跨不同时间窗口的时间切片稳健性分析
criteria.pass_condition: Performance stable across temporal slices

criteria.text: Ablation study for suspect/high-impact features
criteria.text_zh: 对可疑/高影响特征进行消融研究
criteria.pass_condition: Ablation results documented showing feature contribution
criteria.evidence_required: robustness_report.json ablation section or separate ablation report

criteria.text: Full clinical metric panel: accuracy, precision/PPV, NPV, sensitivity, specificity, F1, F2, ROC-AUC, PR-AUC, Brier
criteria.text_zh: 完整临床指标面板：准确率、精确率/PPV、NPV、灵敏度、特异度、F1、F2、ROC-AUC、PR-AUC、Brier
criteria.pass_condition: All 10 metrics present in evaluation report for test split

criteria.text: Confusion matrix provided for train/valid/test with consistency validation
criteria.text_zh: 训练/验证/测试的混淆矩阵已提供，附一致性验证
criteria.pass_condition: Confusion matrix present and consistent with reported metrics

criteria.text: Threshold feasibility documented with selection/guard split flags
criteria.text_zh: 阈值可行性已记录，附选择/保护分割标志
criteria.pass_condition: threshold_feasibility with selection_split and guard_split flags

criteria.text: NRI (Net Reclassification Improvement) vs clinical baseline reported
criteria.text_zh: 报告了 NRI（净重分类改善）与临床基线的对比
criteria.pass_condition: NRI with CI reported vs prevalence and logistic baselines

criteria.text: IDI (Integrated Discrimination Improvement) vs baseline reported
criteria.text_zh: 报告了 IDI（综合判别改善）与基线的对比
criteria.pass_condition: IDI value and p-value reported vs baselines

criteria.text: McNemar test for classification comparison at operating threshold
criteria.text_zh: 在操作阈值处进行 McNemar 分类比较检验
criteria.pass_condition: McNemar test reported for primary model vs baseline

criteria.text: TRIPOD+AI 2024 checklist completed with ≥80% items satisfied
criteria.text_zh: TRIPOD+AI 2024 清单已完成，≥80% 条目满足
criteria.pass_condition: reporting_bias_checklist.json tripod_ai pass rate ≥ 0.80

criteria.text: PROBAST+AI risk of bias assessment completed
criteria.text_zh: PROBAST+AI 偏倚风险评估已完成
criteria.pass_condition: PROBAST signalling questions answered in checklist

criteria.text: Exclusion criteria and missing data handling documented
criteria.text_zh: 排除标准和缺失数据处理已记录
criteria.pass_condition: Documentation present in study protocol or report

criteria.text: Failure modes and known limitations documented
criteria.text_zh: 失败模式和已知局限性已记录
criteria.pass_condition: Limitations section present in final report

criteria.text: Predictive claims clearly separated from causal claims
criteria.text_zh: 预测性主张与因果性主张明确分离
criteria.pass_condition: No causal language used for prediction model results

criteria.text: Model availability / code sharing statement provided
criteria.text_zh: 模型可用性/代码共享声明已提供
criteria.pass_condition: Code/model availability statement in checklist

criteria.text: Data availability statement provided
criteria.text_zh: 数据可用性声明已提供
criteria.pass_condition: Data availability statement in checklist or manuscript

criteria.text: Random seeds fixed and logged for all stochastic components
criteria.text_zh: 所有随机组件的随机种子已固定并记录
criteria.pass_condition: Seed values present in training config and evidence

criteria.text: Software versions and hardware constraints logged
criteria.text_zh: 软件版本和硬件约束已记录
criteria.pass_condition: Version info in training config or attestation

criteria.text: Full training/evaluation config files saved as artifacts
criteria.text_zh: 完整的训练/评估配置文件已保存为工件
criteria.pass_condition: Config JSON files present in evidence directory

criteria.text: Signed execution attestation with payload covering critical artifact hashes
criteria.text_zh: 签名执行证明，有效载荷覆盖关键工件哈希
criteria.pass_condition: execution_attestation.json with valid signature and hash bindings

criteria.text: Manifest lock against baseline with exact match before publication claim
criteria.text_zh: 清单锁定与基线精确匹配后方可发表
criteria.pass_condition: manifest_lock_report.json with baseline_match=true

criteria.text: End-to-end rerun reproduces results within tolerance
criteria.text_zh: 端到端重跑在容差范围内重现结果
criteria.pass_condition: Rerun metrics match original within declared tolerance

criteria.text: Artifact integrity verification (hash-based tamper detection)
criteria.text_zh: 工件完整性验证（基于哈希的篡改检测）
criteria.pass_condition: SHA-256 hashes computed and verified for all evidence files

criteria.text: No sensitive data (PII/PHI) in model artifacts or evidence files
criteria.text_zh: 模型工件或证据文件中无敏感数据（PII/PHI）
criteria.pass_condition: Security scan shows no PII/PHI patterns

criteria.text: Witness quorum and independent key custody for signing authorities
criteria.text_zh: 见证人法定人数和签名机构的独立密钥保管
criteria.pass_condition: Witness records present with independent key verification

criteria.text: Dependency verification and supply chain integrity
criteria.text_zh: 依赖项验证和供应链完整性
criteria.pass_condition: Requirements/lockfile present with hash verification

fairness_equity.name: Fairness & Equity
fairness_equity.weight_note: Scored as part of generalization_evidence (D6) and reporting_standards (D8) weights. Listed separately for structured assessment per TRIPOD+AI/PROBAST+AI requirements.

criteria.text: Subgroup performance reported across key demographic/clinical variables
criteria.text_zh: 报告跨关键人口统计/临床变量的亚组表现
criteria.pass_condition: Performance metrics reported per subgroup

criteria.text: Equalized odds gap < 0.15 across demographic subgroups
criteria.text_zh: 人口统计亚组间的均等化赔率差距 < 0.15
criteria.pass_condition: Max equalized odds gap < 0.15

criteria.text: Disparate impact ratio > 0.80 (four-fifths rule)
criteria.text_zh: 差异影响比 > 0.80（四分之五规则）
criteria.pass_condition: Disparate impact ratio > 0.80 for all subgroup pairs

criteria.text: Minimum subgroup size documented and underpowered subgroups flagged
criteria.text_zh: 最小亚组大小已记录，统计效力不足的亚组已标记
criteria.pass_condition: All subgroups ≥ 20 samples or flagged as underpowered

criteria.text: Disparity mitigation strategy documented if bias detected
criteria.text_zh: 如检测到偏差，已记录差异缓解策略
criteria.pass_condition: Mitigation documentation present when disparity exceeds thresholds

sample_size_adequacy.name: Sample Size Adequacy
sample_size_adequacy.weight_note: Scored as part of data_integrity (D1) and statistical_validity (D5) weights. Listed separately for structured assessment per Riley et al. criteria.

criteria.text: Events per variable (EPV) ≥ 10 (minimum) or ≥ 20 (recommended)
criteria.text_zh: 每变量事件数 (EPV) ≥ 10（最低）或 ≥ 20（推荐）
criteria.pass_condition: EPV ≥ 10 (pass), EPV ≥ 20 (no warnings)

criteria.text: Shrinkage factor ≥ 0.90 or pmsampsize calculation cited
criteria.text_zh: 收缩因子 ≥ 0.90 或引用 pmsampsize 计算
criteria.pass_condition: Estimated shrinkage ≥ 0.90

criteria.text: Minimum 100 events and 100 non-events for model development
criteria.text_zh: 模型开发至少 100 个事件和 100 个非事件
criteria.pass_condition: n_events ≥ 100 and n_non_events ≥ 100 in training data

criteria.text: Test set has ≥ 50 events for reliable performance estimation
criteria.text_zh: 测试集有 ≥ 50 个事件以进行可靠的性能评估
criteria.pass_condition: Test split event count ≥ 50

scoring.dimension_scoring: Each dimension scored as percentage of checks passed × weight

fail_actions.block_all_claims: Fatal flaw — all performance claims are invalid until resolved. Maps to checklist sections B-E, J.
fail_actions.downgrade_to_preliminary: Significant gap — downgrade from publication-grade to preliminary. Maps to checklist sections F-I, K-M.
fail_actions.flag_gap: Minor gap — document and address if targeting top-tier journal.

decision_rule.description: Fail-closed policy: any CRITICAL failure blocks publication-grade claims regardless of total score.
steps: 1. Count CRITICAL severity failures → if any, cap grade at 'Major issues' maximum
2. Count HIGH severity failures → if >3, cap grade at 'Solid but gaps remain' maximum
3. Compute weighted score across 10 primary dimensions (D1-D10)
4. Apply score threshold to determine grade
5. Apply cap from steps 1-2 if lower than score-based grade
6. Supplementary dimensions D11-D12 provide structured assessment but do not add to total score

journal_mapping.description: Minimum review level and score for top-tier journals

agent_instructions.on_review: Apply criteria at the requested level (quick/standard/comprehensive). For each criterion, check evidence_required against the project's evidence directory. Score pass/fail per criterion, compute dimension scores, then total.
agent_instructions.on_gap_found: Map the gap to its criterion ID, severity, and fail_action. Provide remediation priority ordered by: CRITICAL > HIGH > MEDIUM > LOW, then by dimension weight.
agent_instructions.on_journal_target: Look up journal_mapping to determine minimum level and score. Run at least that level. Cross-reference with journal-rigor-standards.json for journal-specific requirements.
agent_instructions.on_batch_review: Apply same standard to all projects. Output comparison matrix with per-project scores and per-criterion pass/fail status.
